video_info.title: Indian Football League 2026
video_info.shortDescription: Gokulam Kerala FC take on Namdhari FC in their Indian Football League 2026 showdown at EMS Stadium. With both sides determined to grab early momentum, fans can look forward to an electrifying contest as Gokulam’s attacking prowess collides with Namdhari’s defensive steel. Which team will prevail?  Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
